content:
You glance at your watch. It’s 10:34 a.m. Suddenly, there’s a loud boom, and your plane shakes! But before you can be scared, your eyes snap open. You’re still on the plane, and the gentle hum of the engine is all around you. You check your watch again. It says 9:35 a.m. How is that possible?  

Was it a dream? Or did time rewind? You look out the window and see the bright blue ocean sparkling below, just like before. Maybe the plane never exploded at all!  

As the plane flies smoothly, you smile. Sometimes, even when things seem scary, they can turn out different than you expect. Maybe this is a secret adventure, a chance to fix something or explore time itself!  

You tuck your watch away, ready for whatever magic the day might bring. After all, the sky is full of surprises.
